ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plant_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant species */,
  "sepal_length" REAL /* Length of the sepal */,
  "sepal_width" REAL /* Width of the sepal */,
  "petal_length" REAL /* Length of the petal */,
  "petal_width" REAL /* Width of the petal */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of plant species */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant species was added */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant species was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for the plant species details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_species_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant species type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant species type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant species type */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant species type was added */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant species type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant species being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis result was added */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis result was last updated */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_analysis_type FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_type") REFERENCES analysis_types ("analysis_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES plant_species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was added */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant species being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the plant species */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant species was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, analyze) */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was added */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES plant_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission details */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was added */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned the permission */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_types" (
  "analysis_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis type */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Name of the analysis type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis type */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis type was added */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis */,
  "result" TEXT /* Detailed result of the analysis */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis result was added */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)
